title: androsace villosa var. bisulca
intro: Androsace villosa var. bisulca, also known as Himalayan woolly rock jasmine, is a rare alpine perennial plant native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Androsace villosa var. bisulca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its flowers and leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory problems and skin issues.
